title: Goldfish Tank Longevity
description: How long can a goldfish live in a given tank size and what tank size is needed for optimal lifespan?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the expected lifespan of goldfish in various aquarium volumes, including the minimum tank size required to support healthy growth (e.g., a 10‑inch fish) and a comparison with pond living. Relevant documents should discuss lifespan trends, size limits, and why very small containers (such as 1 L) are insufficient.

title: Wi‑Fi vs Bluetooth
description: What are the differences between Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth regarding functionality, range, and typical use cases?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed comparison of Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth, including their technical definitions, capabilities, performance characteristics (such as speed and range), common applications, and guidance on when to use each technology. Documents that describe the two wireless technologies, contrast their strengths and limitations, and provide practical usage scenarios are considered relevant.

title: Northern Race Violence
description: What factors led to racial violence in the North during World War I?
narrative: The user seeks information on how the migration of thousands of Southern Black Americans to northern cities during WWI triggered racial tensions and violent outbreaks. Relevant material should describe the Great Migration, describe specific incidents of Northern racial violence, and place these events in the broader context of President Wilson’s war rhetoric, the push for the League of Nations, and contemporary political debates.

title: Declaratory Judgment Basics
description: Explain what a declaratory judgment is, including its purpose and limits.
narrative: The user seeks a clear legal definition of a declaratory judgment, emphasizing that it declares the rights, duties, or obligations of the parties in a civil dispute without ordering any action or awarding damages. Relevant information should describe the nature of the judgment, its civil context, and its non‑enforcement characteristics.

title: RUQ Pain Causes
description: What are the possible medical conditions that cause right upper quadrant abdominal pain accompanied by nerve, sensory, or other abdominal symptoms?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive listings of diagnoses that present with right upper quadrant pain together with neurological (nerve, sensory) or abdominal manifestations. Relevant documents should enumerate the causes (e.g., 21‑23 conditions) and associate each cause with the specific symptom categories mentioned.

title: Health Determinants
description: Identify the major social, economic, and environmental factors that shape individual health outcomes.
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the determinants of health, focusing on how income, social status, education, and the broader physical and social environment influence health. Relevant material should explain that these contextual factors, rather than individual choices alone, drive health disparities and illustrate the link between socioeconomic gaps and health differences.

title: Legionella incubation
description: What is the typical incubation period for Legionnaires' disease and how does it vary across different Legionella species and patient settings?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information on the time between exposure to Legionella bacteria and the appearance of symptoms, including the usual 2‑10 day range, rare extensions up to 20 days, and any differences among species (e.g., L. pneumophila, L. longbeachae, L. feeleii, L. micdadei, L. anisa) or between community and hospital exposures. Documents that provide incubation periods, species‑specific data, or context of exposure are considered relevant.

title: Jamaica Weather Update
description: What are the current weather conditions, daily forecasts, and any hurricane or tropical storm alerts for cities and towns across Jamaica?
narrative: The user is seeking up-to-date meteorological information for Jamaica, including real‑time conditions, short‑term forecasts for individual cities and towns, and any active hurricane or tropical storm warnings. Relevant documents should provide official forecasts, satellite imagery, maps, and alert details, and may also include related live radio feeds that broadcast weather updates.

title: Speech Disorder Comparison
description: What are the key differences in symptoms, causes, and treatment options among aphasia, dysarthria, and spasmodic dysphonia?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative overview of three specific speech disorders—aphasia, dysarthria, and spasmodic dysphonia. Relevant information must clearly define each condition, describe its primary symptoms (e.g., language comprehension loss for aphasia, slurred speech for dysarthria, hoarse/airy voice for spasmodic dysphonia), explain typical causes or underlying mechanisms, and outline common treatment or management approaches. Documents that discuss any of these disorders in detail and allow the user to distinguish among them are considered relevant.

title: British Columbia Name Origin
description: What is the historical origin of the name "British Columbia" and why was it chosen?
narrative: The user is seeking a concise explanation of how the province of British Columbia received its name, including who selected it (Queen Victoria), the year it was proclaimed (1858), the reference to the Columbia River, and the connection to Captain Robert Gray's ship "Columbia." Relevant documents should directly address these naming details and provide the contextual background.

title: Sous Vide Pork
description: What is the recommended method for cooking pork chops sous vide for two people to keep them juicy and flavorful?
narrative: The user is looking for practical guidance on preparing pork chops using sous vide, specifically for a serving of two. Relevant information should include tips such as using a single large double‑cut chop instead of two smaller chops, recommended cooking times and temperatures, and any additional steps to ensure the meat stays tender and flavorful.

title: Flea Population Breakdown
description: What are the relative percentages of eggs, larvae, pupae, and adult fleas in a typical infestation?
narrative: The user wants detailed quantitative information on the distribution of flea life stages, specifically the proportion of eggs, larvae, pupae (cocoons), and adult fleas in a given environment. Relevant documents must provide percentages or ratios for each stage, indicating that adults comprise a small fraction while eggs, larvae, and pupae make up the majority of the population.

title: Dust Bowl Causes
description: What were the primary environmental and human factors that led to the Dust Bowl?
narrative: The user wants to know the main contributors to the Dust Bowl, including natural elements such as drought and dust storms and human activities like intensive farming and land‑use practices, and any suggested mitigation techniques such as contour plowing. Relevant content must discuss these causes and related mitigation insights.

title: William Booth Biography
description: What were William Booth's major contributions, role, and legacy as the founder of The Salvation Army?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about William Booth, focusing on his life (1829‑1912), his founding of The Salvation Army, his tenure as the first General, his motivations as a former Methodist lay preacher, and his cultural impact (e.g., poems and music dedicated to him). Relevant documents should detail his biography, key achievements, succession by his son Bramwell Booth, and any notable artistic tributes, while excluding unrelated figures or general Salvation Army history that does not center on Booth himself.

title: Margin Types
description: What are the key differences between active and passive continental margins in terms of tectonic setting, geological processes, and resulting landforms?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison of active versus passive continental margins, including how each forms at plate boundaries, the dominant geological processes (e.g., subduction, sedimentation), typical features (such as volcanic arcs or broad sediment wedges), and example regions. Relevant documents should address the definition of an active continental margin as a submerged edge overriding oceanic lithosphere at a convergent boundary and contrast it with a passive margin that remains after continental breakup.

title: BSN Nurse Definition
description: What qualifications and education distinguish a BSN‑educated registered nurse from other types of nurses?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear explanation of what a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) entails, including the required four‑year degree, accreditation standards, and how this credential differs from other nursing pathways such as associate or diploma programs. Relevant documents must describe the BSN as a four‑year degree from an accredited institution and identify the BSN nurse as a registered nurse with this specific educational background.

title: CMV Definition
description: What is continuous mandatory ventilation and how does it work in mechanical respirators?
narrative: The user seeks a clear definition and explanation of continuous mandatory ventilation, including that every breath is mandatory, breaths can be patient‑ or machine‑triggered, a minimum rate is set, and patients may trigger additional breaths. Relevant content must describe the mode's characteristics, triggering and cycling mechanisms, and its typical clinical application.

title: Trapezoid Midsegment Proof
description: How can I prove that the midsegment of a trapezoid is parallel to the bases and its length equals the average of the two base lengths?
narrative: The user wants a rigorous geometric proof of the trapezoid midsegment theorem, covering both the parallelism to the bases and the length formula (average of the bases). Relevant results may include step‑by‑step derivations, diagrams, or references to dynamic geometry tools such as Geometer's Sketchpad that illustrate the properties.

title: AML Senior Analyst
description: What are the primary responsibilities, reporting structure, and daily tasks of a Senior Analyst in AML transaction monitoring?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about the role of a Senior Analyst who oversees daily AML monitoring processes. Relevant documents should describe leadership duties, being the go‑to person for daily issues, reporting to the Scenario Review Manager, and conducting analytical activities related to AML transaction monitoring systems.

title: Thai Flag Meaning
description: What do the colors of the Thai national flag symbolize?
narrative: The user seeks a concise explanation of the symbolic meaning behind each color on Thailand's flag, covering the red stripe (blood for independence), the white stripe (purity and Buddhism), and the blue stripe (national color representing the monarchy). Relevant sources must describe these specific associations.

title: Enroute Icing Forecast
description: What are the anticipated icing conditions, including severity and altitude ranges, along a given flight route over the next 12 hours?
narrative: The user is planning a flight and needs a comprehensive forecast of potential icing hazards on the enroute segment. Relevant information must include icing reports (PIREPs), forecasts (SIGMET/AIRMET), temperature and dew‑point profiles, precipitation type (rain, snow, sleet), turbulence, convection, and wind aloft data, as well as supporting observations from METAR, TAF, satellite, radar, NEXRAD, and prognostic charts. Documents that describe any of these elements for the specified route and time window are considered relevant.

title: Concrete Floor Cost
description: What is the total cost per square foot to install a concrete floor, including waterproofing, metal lath, overlay, finishing, and sealing?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive cost estimate for a concrete flooring project. Relevant information must include the base price range for concrete floors ($2–$6 or $15–$30 per square foot depending on complexity) and the additional $2–$3 per square foot for the series of applied products (waterproofing, metal lath, concrete overlay, finishing, and sealing). Documents that break down these components and provide total cost calculations are considered relevant.

title: Exuma Hotels Switzerland
description: What are the top Exuma brand hotels in Switzerland that are renowned for haute cuisine and exceptional service?
narrative: The user is seeking information about Exuma hotels located in Switzerland, specifically looking for establishments that are highly regarded, offer outstanding culinary experiences, and provide superior service. Relevant documents should describe the presence of Exuma hotels in Switzerland, highlight their reputation and popularity, and mention their haute cuisine and service quality. Sources that list or review these hotels, detail their amenities, or compare them to other luxury hotels in Switzerland would satisfy the need.

title: Great White Range
description: What is the global geographic distribution of great white sharks, including their northernmost and southernmost occurrences?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on where great white sharks can be found worldwide, with particular interest in the extreme latitude limits (e.g., farthest north and south) and how their warm‑blooded physiology enables them to inhabit both cold and warm waters. Documents that describe the species' range from Alaska to the southern tip of South America, and mention their presence in intermediate regions, are relevant.

title: Medicare DME Costs
description: What are the patient out‑of‑pocket costs and contact numbers for Medicare coverage of durable medical equipment?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about how Medicare reimburses durable medical equipment (DME), specifically the amount a patient must pay (20% of the Medicare‑approved amount after the $135 deductible) and the phone numbers to call for clarification, including the TTY line. Relevant documents must provide the cost‑sharing formula, deductible amount, and contact information.

title: Gene Definition
description: What is a gene and how does it relate to chromosomes and exons?
narrative: The user seeks a clear, concise explanation of the term 'gene', including its function as a DNA segment that codes for a protein, its location on a chromosome, and how it differs from or overlaps with an exon. Documents that define gene, chromosome, and exon are considered relevant.

title: Vagus Nerve Functions
description: What are the primary physiological functions and signals transmitted by the vagus nerve?
narrative: The user wants a concise summary of the vagus nerve’s role in the body, including its long anatomical course from the brainstem to the viscera and the variety of instinctive responses and signal types it carries. Relevant documents should describe the nerve’s length, pathway, and the functional signals it conveys.

title: Xylem Cell Types
description: What are the structural differences between tracheids and vessel elements and how do these differences influence water transport in plants?
narrative: The user wants a clear explanation of how tracheids and vessel elements differ in shape, size, and organization, and how those morphological traits affect their function in the plant's water-conducting system. Relevant passages should describe tracheids, vessel elements, their lengths, connections into vessels, and their roles in primary and secondary xylem, as well as the mechanism of water movement through cohesion and tension.

title: RSA Origin
description: When was the RSA encryption algorithm invented and who created it?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative details about the inception of RSA, specifically the year it was first described and the identities and affiliations of its inventors. Relevant material should mention the 1977 publication and the contributions of Ron Rivest, Adi Shamir, and Leonard Adleman at MIT.

title: Soviet Stamp History
description: When did each former Soviet republic start issuing its own postage stamps?
narrative: The user is looking for a chronological overview of postage stamp issuance for Russia and the constituent republics that later became independent after the USSR dissolution. Relevant documents should list the year each republic (e.g., Russia, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Ukraine, and the other former Soviet states) issued its first stamp, noting the historical context such as the formation of the USSR and the 1991 breakup.

title: LVH Complications
description: What are the health outcomes associated with left ventricular hypertrophy?
narrative: The user seeks information about the clinical consequences of left ventricular hypertrophy, specifically its association with increased risk of heart failure, heart attacks (myocardial infarction), and overall mortality. Relevant documents should describe how LVH develops (e.g., due to hypertension or aortic valve disease) and explicitly link the condition to higher rates of these adverse cardiac events and death. Sources that focus solely on anatomy or unrelated aspects without mentioning these risk outcomes are not considered relevant.

title: Florida Therapist Exceptions
description: What are the licensing requirements for family therapists in Florida and the specific exceptions for physicians and psychologists employed at veteran hospitals under the Baker Act?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information that explains Florida law requiring family therapists to be licensed, while noting the exemption for physicians and psychologists when they work at a veteran's hospital that qualifies as a receiving or treatment facility under the Baker Act. Relevant content must describe the licensing rule, the exact circumstances of the exemption, and clarify that veteran outpatient clinics are not included.

title: Three Percenters Origins
description: What historical figures or organizations are the Three Percenters modeled after?
narrative: The user seeks information about the ideological and historical influences that shaped the Three Percenters, including any specific groups, movements, or individuals they claim to emulate. Relevant documents should discuss the origins, inspirations, or models referenced by the Three Percenters, and explain how these connections inform the group's identity and actions.

title: Military Suicide Trend
description: When did suicide overtake combat as the leading cause of death in the U.S. military?
narrative: The user seeks information on the year(s) when suicide became the top cause of death among U.S. service members, looking for data that show the shift from war-related deaths to suicides, including any statistics, reports, or charts that document this change.

title: Dermatologist Endorsement
description: How does promotion by doctors and dermatologists affect the perceived credibility and market success of skincare brands such as Theraderm?
narrative: The user seeks insight into the influence of medical professional endorsement on consumer trust and brand image for skincare products. Relevant documents should describe doctors or dermatologists actively promoting brands, explain how this association boosts the product’s image, and, if available, provide evidence of its effect on consumer perception or sales.

title: Shingles Treatment Timing
description: What is the optimal window to begin antiviral therapy for shingles and which antivirals are recommended?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on treating a shingles (herpes zoster) rash, specifically the importance of initiating antiviral medication within the first 72 hours of rash onset, the comparative effectiveness of acyclovir, valacyclovir, and famciclovir, and any adjunctive pain management recommendations. Relevant documents should describe the rash progression, the dermatomal pattern, and the impact of early antiviral treatment on severity and duration.

title: Ecological Anthropology Definition
description: What does ecological anthropology study and how does it conceptualize the relationship between humans and their environment?
narrative: The user seeks a concise yet comprehensive explanation of ecological anthropology, including its definition as the study of cultural adaptations to environments, its focus on the relationship between human populations and their biophysical surroundings, the emphasis on humans as ecological populations as the unit of analysis, and the role of culture as the mechanism for alteration and adaptation.

title: Longest Axon
description: What is the longest axon in the human body and where is it found?
narrative: The user wants to identify the longest axon in humans, including its anatomical location (e.g., the sciatic nerve), its relative length compared to other axons, and any relevant functional details. Relevant documents should mention the specific axon and provide context about its size and role.

title: Paris Airport Roles
description: What are the main functions, traffic volumes, and locations of the major airports serving Paris?
narrative: The user wants a concise overview of Paris’s principal airports, specifying each airport’s IATA code, its relative position to the city, whether it handles primarily commercial or private traffic, and an indication of its passenger‑traffic ranking (e.g., busiest, second‑largest). Relevant information must mention Charles de Gaulle (CDG) as the busiest international hub, Orly (ORY) as the second‑largest commercial airport, and Bourget (LFPB) as a historic airport now used mainly for private flights.

title: Square vs. Number
description: What real numbers satisfy the inequality x² < x?
narrative: The user wants to know the precise set of real values where the square of a number is smaller than the number itself. Relevant information should explain the behavior of the squaring function on negative numbers, zero, and positive numbers, and identify the interval (0, 1) as the only region where x² < x holds, noting that no negative numbers satisfy the inequality.

title: Blue Eyes Spruce Growth
description: What is the typical annual growth rate of Baby Blue Eyes Spruce and how does it compare to other Colorado Spruce varieties?
narrative: The user seeks details on the expected upward growth per year for Baby Blue Eyes Spruce, including a comparison with the normal Colorado Spruce growth range (12‑18 inches per year) and any factors—such as the rootstock used in grafting—that may influence that rate. Relevant passages should mention the 8‑inch‑per‑year figure, the comparative growth figures, and the grafting/rootstock effect.

title: Hydrogen Phase Temps
description: What temperatures cause hydrogen to change from gas to liquid and from liquid to solid under standard pressure?
narrative: The user is looking for precise temperature points at which hydrogen transitions between its three phases (gas, liquid, solid) at standard temperature and pressure. Relevant documents must provide the specific temperatures (in Fahrenheit or Celsius) for the gas‑to‑liquid and liquid‑to‑solid transitions, mention the pressure condition (STP), and be scientifically reliable.

title: Double Cheeseburger Calories
description: What is the caloric content of the Double Cheeseburger with two flame‑grilled beef patties and American cheese?
narrative: The user is looking for the exact number of calories for the Double Cheeseburger described (two beef patties, melted American cheese, pickles, mustard, ketchup on a sesame seed bun). Relevant passages must state the calorie count for this specific menu item; other nutritional facts or unrelated burgers are not relevant.
